detail.description:
Welcome to Coffee Rush Run ！！！
Coffee Rush Run is a new merge game an innovative simulation and management game designed to offer players an immersive experience in the world of culinary entrepreneurship. With its captivating gameplay and unique mechanics, Coffee Rush Run promises to redefine the genre and provide endless hours of entertainment.
At Coffee Rush Run, players step into the shoes of a budding entrepreneur with dreams of building the ultimate cafe empire. From humble beginnings, they
